title: Comparative Genomics of Staphylococcus aureus in Bovine Mastitis
author: Lis LSR Rocha
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.zhrf356

steps.title: The bacteria used in this study...
steps.instruction: The bacteria used in this study were maintained on BHI agar (Brain Heart Infusion, BHI HiMedia, Mumbai, India) at 37 °C

steps.title: and stored in the long term...
steps.instruction: and stored in the long term in BHI containing 20% glycerol.
